languages.original_text: "Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"

languages.text: "Нунциус недоумевает при виде трепета и утомления всех, кто посетил Администратум. Я разделяю его недоумение. Неужели столь обременительно проводить время ожидания в размышлениях и прочих благотворных занятиях для ума?"

"Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"
languages.original_text: "Нунциус недоумевает при виде трепета и утомления всех, кто посетил Администратум. Я разделяю его недоумение. Неужели столь обременительно проводить время ожидания в размышлениях и прочих благотворных занятиях для ума?"

"Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"

"Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"

languages.text: «Nuncius está perplejo ante el pavor y el agotamiento de todos los visitantes al Administratum. Comparto esa sorpresa. ¿Es esperar algo tan terrible, cuando uno puede dedicar el tiempo a reflexionar y realizar otras actividades mentales beneficiosas?».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius está perplejo ante el pavor y el agotamiento de todos los visitantes al Administratum. Comparto esa sorpresa. ¿Es esperar algo tan terrible, cuando uno puede dedicar el tiempo a reflexionar y realizar otras actividades mentales beneficiosas?».

languages.text: 「行政局を訪れるすべての者の、あの恐怖と疲弊の様子を前に、ヌンキウスは当惑しています。私も彼の当惑を分かち合います。待つことはそれほど苦痛でしょうか――その時間を、瞑想やその他の精神に資する営みに費やすことができるというのに？」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"

traits.locale_text: 「行政局を訪れるすべての者の、あの恐怖と疲弊の様子を前に、ヌンキウスは当惑しています。私も彼の当惑を分かち合います。待つことはそれほど苦痛でしょうか――その時間を、瞑想やその他の精神に資する営みに費やすことができるというのに？」

languages.text: “努恩修斯十分困惑于内政部全体办事人员表现出的恐惧和疲惫，对此，我也同样感到困惑。等待真有如此难熬吗？这些时间明明可以用于冥想，或者其他有益心智的活动。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯十分困惑于内政部全体办事人员表现出的恐惧和疲惫，对此，我也同样感到困惑。等待真有如此难熬吗？这些时间明明可以用于冥想，或者其他有益心智的活动。”

languages.text: "Nuncius ist angesichts der Erschöpfung und Angst der Besucher des Administratums verblüfft. Und ich teile seine Verblüffung. Ist Warten wirklich so lästig, wenn man die Zeit mit Kontemplation und anderen heilenden Maßnahmen für den Verstand verbringen kann?
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius ist angesichts der Erschöpfung und Angst der Besucher des Administratums verblüfft. Und ich teile seine Verblüffung. Ist Warten wirklich so lästig, wenn man die Zeit mit Kontemplation und anderen heilenden Maßnahmen für den Verstand verbringen kann?

languages.text: « Nuncius est stupéfié à la vue de l'état déplorable de tous ceux qui ont affaire à l'Administratum. Je partage sa stupeur. Attendre est-il donc si terrible, lorsqu'on peut consacrer ce temps à la contemplation et autres occupations salutaires de l'esprit ? »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius est stupéfié à la vue de l'état déplorable de tous ceux qui ont affaire à l'Administratum. Je partage sa stupeur. Attendre est-il donc si terrible, lorsqu'on peut consacrer ce temps à la contemplation et autres occupations salutaires de l'esprit ? »

languages.text: "Nuncius, Administratum'a gelen herkesin o korku ve yorgunluğu karşısında şaşkınlığa düşüyor. Ben de bu şaşkınlığı paylaşıyorum. İnsan zamanını tefekkür ederek ve zihnin diğer faydalı uğraşlarıyla geçirebilecekken beklemek bu kadar külfetli mi olmalı?"
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is baffled at the sight of the dread and exhaustion of all who attend the Administratum. I share in his bafflement. Is waiting so onerous, even when one can spend the time in contemplation and other salutary occupations of the mind?"

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, Administratum'a gelen herkesin o korku ve yorgunluğu karşısında şaşkınlığa düşüyor. Ben de bu şaşkınlığı paylaşıyorum. İnsan zamanını tefekkür ederek ve zihnin diğer faydalı uğraşlarıyla geçirebilecekken beklemek bu kadar külfetli mi olmalı?"
